_comment: Official Azure DevOps MCP Server (microsoft/azure-devops-mcp), local stdio via npx. This server is READ+WRITE and has NO read-only flag — read-only is enforced by the CONNECTING ACCOUNT / PAT (see SETUP.md): authenticate as a read-only (Reader/Stakeholder) user or with a PAT scoped to read-only. Replace YOUR_ADO_ORG with your Azure DevOps organization name. The remote server (mcp.dev.azure.com) has an X-MCP-Readonly header but does not yet support Claude/Codex/Cursor. Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml.
